response.justification: Significantly exceeds the 6+ year requirement with 15+ years of software development and 8+ years in modern full-stack web development. Current Staff role at re:cinq demonstrates direct alignment with TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure. Strong architectural background across microservices and scaling. Minor gaps in explicit Nest.js, React depth, and frontend testing framework specificity are easily bridged given the foundational full-stack expertise.
strengths: Exceeds seniority requirement with Staff-level roles and proven architectural depth in scaling systems
Perfect primary stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, and current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Extensive full-stack credibility across frontend, backend, databases, and DevOps; fluent in multiple languages
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js framework; experience primarily with raw Node.js, Express, and GraphQL backends
React experience lighter than role prefers; resume shows deeper background with Ember.js and earlier frameworks
Security and authentication best practices not explicitly demonstrated; frontend testing frameworks (Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned
